title: After adding an expense with description 'Coffee', amount '4.50', and category 'Food', the text 'Coffee' is visible in the expense list.
After adding 3 expenses, exactly 3 expense entries are visible in the list.
After editing an expense's description from 'Coffee' to 'Latte', the text 'Latte' is visible in the list and 'Coffee' is not.
After deleting an expense, that expense's description is no longer visible anywhere in the list.
After deleting all expenses, an empty state message is visible and no expense entries are present in the list.
After submitting the add form with an empty description field, the expense count in the list does not increase.
After submitting the add form with an amount of 0, the expense count does not increase and a visible validation message is shown.
After adding one 'Food' expense and one 'Transport' expense then filtering by category 'Food', only the 'Food' expense is visible in the list.
After switching to the Summary view, a total for the 'Food' category is visible reflecting the sum of all Food expenses.
After Food expenses exceed the Food monthly budget, an over-budget indicator is visible for the Food category in the Summary view.
